funFacts: Pufferfish inflating near Reefs inflate their bodies into a spike-covered ball by swallowing large amounts of water to deter predators.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing intricate color highlighting using acrylic or light watercolors.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about prehistoric animal anatomy while developing fine motor coordination.
